rationale: El Niño now confirmed active is a direct and fresh threat to Portugal's wildfire season and drought risk, meaningfully affecting daily life and the tourism-dependent economy.

top_events.title: El Niño confirmed active, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is under way; for Portugal this directly raises the risk of severe drought, wildfires, and disruption to agriculture and tourism — the most relevant headline this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump says US and Iran reached a 'great settlement'
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could ease global oil prices, providing modest relief to Portuguese energy and transport costs.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Atlantic migration routes via the Canary Islands are closely watched in Portugal; papal attention raises political and humanitarian salience of a nearby issue.
